name: rankedagi
title: RankedAGI
description: Search AI model rankings and benchmark scores from RankedAGI.
author: tavlean

commands.name: search-models
commands.title: Search Models
commands.description: Search AI models and inspect their RAGI composites and benchmark scores.

commands.name: search-benchmarks
commands.title: Search Benchmarks
commands.description: Search benchmarks and see how every model ranks on them.

tools.name: search-models
tools.title: Search Models
tools.description: Search RankedAGI AI models by name, slug, organization, or family and return a compact ranked list with RAGI scores.

tools.name: get-model
tools.title: Get Model
tools.description: Get one RankedAGI model's identity, pricing, RAGI composite scores, benchmark scores, reasoning levels, and RankedAGI URL.

tools.name: rank-models-by-benchmark
tools.title: Rank Models by Benchmark
tools.description: Rank RankedAGI AI models by a specific benchmark or RAGI composite, resolving benchmark keys, names, and short names.

tools.name: compare-models
tools.title: Compare Models
tools.description: Compare 2 to 5 RankedAGI AI models across the five RAGI composites or selected benchmark scores.

preferences.name: dataUrl
preferences.title: Data URL
preferences.description: Override to a local RankedAGI dev server during development (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5197/api/export).
